ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the exchange table */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the record entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock opened for the session */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock closed for the session */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded during the session */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feed" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicator" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company table */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of market indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_prediction" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price prediction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company table */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted stock price */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user table */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company table */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view data for the company */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit data for the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
